title: ADR and project documentation for versioned AI UI protocol foundation
objective: Document the architectural decision and implementation plan for shared AI UI protocol contracts used by CopilotKit and native UI drivers.
non_goals: Do not change runtime code in this task.
Do not archive the existing CopilotKit workflow.
Do not modify deployment secrets or runtime data.
acceptance_checks: ADR explains versioning, extensions and driver boundaries.
Architecture plan describes module structure and stages.
Workflow block contains task packets for implementation.
